title: Sorghum lividum
taxonomy: Sorghum lividum is classified within the family Poaceae. It belongs to the tribe Paniceae and is a species of grass. The scientific classification of Sorghum lividum is as follows: kingdom Plantae, clade Angiosperms, clade Monocots, order Poales, family Poaceae, tribe Paniceae, genus Sorghum, species S. lividum. This classification indicates its relationships with other plant species. Further research may provide more information on the specific characteristics that define this classification.
